name: KP Sharma Oli
reason: Remanded by court for investigation into criminal negligence regarding the 2025 Gen Z protest deaths. Attended hearing virtually due to health.

name: Ramesh Lekhak
reason: Court granted 5 days of custody following recommendations of the Karki Commission for his role in the September 2025 protest crackdown.

name: Deepak Khadka
reason: Remanded for 7 days in a money laundering probe linked to burnt banknotes and license irregularities discovered during the 2025 unrest.

name: Rekha Sharma
reason: Arrested in connection with long-standing child labor exploitation and domestic abuse allegations.
